news.t: WisdomTree Launches Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD)

holdings.infoBox: NTSD is an equity ETF with a total of 498 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.10%, Apple at 6.23%, Alphabet at 6.18%, Dreyfus Trsy Oblig Cash Mgmt Cl Ins at 5.98%, and Microsoft at 4.01%.

overview.description: The WisdomTree Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in US large-cap equities and international equity index futures contracts. The fund uses a model-based approach and seeks total return. NTSD was launched on Mar 19, 2026 and is issued by WisdomTree.

data.title: WisdomTree Launches Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD)
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--WisdomTree today announced the launch of the WisdomTree Efficient U.S. Plus International Equity Fund (NTSD).
